hero.title: Vote Smart. Vote Informed.
hero.subtitle: Your AI-powered assistant for navigating Indian elections — from finding candidates to locating your polling booth.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three simple steps to become an informed voter
how_it_works.step1_desc: Get AI-summarized manifesto breakdowns and unbiased candidate comparisons for your constituency.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Locate your nearest polling station with real-time navigation and estimated wait times.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Access your personalized voter roadmap with registration deadlines, documents needed, and more.

features.title: Built for Every Indian Voter
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed with accessibility and inclusivity at heart
features.multilingual_desc: Available in 9+ Indian languages so every citizen can participate.
features.ai_powered_desc: Gemini AI provides personalized, unbiased guidance tailored to you.
features.realtime_desc: Live candidate data, booth locations, and election updates at your fingertips.
features.privacy_desc: Your data stays on your device. We never share personal voter information.

cta_section.title: Ready to Vote Smart?
cta_section.subtitle: Join thousands of informed voters. Create your account in under a minute.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your voter dashboard

register.subtitle: Join ElectAssist and become an informed voter
